name: dev-toolkit
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for shared development workflows, security checks, documentation, and role-specific engineering skills.

plugins.name: common-core
plugins.description: Shared core skills for requirement clarification, task intake, impact scanning, and final response standards.

plugins.name: common-security
plugins.description: Shared security and production-safety checks for secrets, privacy, dependencies, and dangerous operations.

plugins.name: common-dev-workflow
plugins.description: Shared development workflow skills for Git preparation, planning, testing, PR summaries, and deployment checklists.

plugins.name: common-documentation
plugins.description: Shared documentation skills for task completion docs, weekly reports, release notes, incident reports, and decision records.

plugins.name: backend-tools
plugins.description: Backend engineering skills for API design, Spring Boot review, transaction boundaries, JPA, Redis, and backend testing.
